data.description: NUCOR MISSED Q4 REVENUE AND EARNINGS ESTIMATES BUT EXPECTS A Q1 2026 EARNINGS REBOUND ACROSS ALL SEGMENTS, LED BY A STRONG RECOVERY IN STEEL MILLS AND GAINS IN RAW MATERIALS.

data.title: Agilysys (AGYS) stock drops after missing Q3 earnings with EPS at 42 cents, revenue at $80.39m, below estimates.
data.description: Agilysys Inc. (NASDAQ: AGYS) experienced a decline in shares during extended trading on Monday following the release of its third-quarter earnings report. The report revealed that the company missed EPS estimates, reporting earnings of 42 cents per share compared to the estimated 46 cents. Despite falling short on EPS, Agilysys exceeded revenue expectations with quarterly revenue reaching $80.39 million, surpassing the anticipated $79.03 million. Investors are advised to monitor AGYS stock movements closely as the price may fluctuate in response to these figures. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CVector secures $5M in seed funding led by Powerhouse Ventures for AI solutions in energy industries.
data.description: Powerhouse Ventures takes the lead in investing in CVector's innovative AI solution designed for energy-intensive industries. The announcement was made in New York on January 26, 2026. CVector successfully closed an oversubscribed seed round, securing $5 million USD in funding. Powerhouse Ventures led the investment, with Fusion Fund and Hitachi Ventures also participating in the round.

data.title: Rocket Lab will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb. 26 after U.S. market close.
data.description: Rocket Lab is set to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the U.S. markets close on February 26th.

data.title: First Bank reported $12.3M in Q4 2025 income, with full-year net income totaling $43.7M. Strong growth in earnings.
data.description: In Hamilton, New Jersey, on January 26, 2026, First Bank (Nasdaq Global Market: FRBA) released its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. During this period, the bank reported a net income of $12.3 million, translating to $0.49 per diluted share. This marked an increase from the fourth quarter of 2024, which saw a net income of $10.5 million, equivalent to $0.41 per diluted share. In terms of performance metrics, the return on average assets for Q4 2025 was 1.21%, while the return on average equity and return on average tangible equity were 11.11% and 12.58%, respectively. These figures showed improvements from the same quarter in 2024, which recorded figures of 1.10% for return on average assets, 10.27% for return on average equity, and 11.82% for return on average tangible equity.

data.title: Barrett-Jackson Scottsdale Auction sells 1,911 vehicles for $191 million, 100% sell-through rate. Linda Perry hosts sale of Camaro.
data.description: The recent auction held by Barrett-Jackson in Scottsdale, Ariz. saw a total of 1,911 No Reserve collectible vehicles being sold. The auction generated an impressive revenue of over $191 million from these sales.

data.title: Central Garden & Pet appoints Apur Patel as Chief Legal Officer, effective January 26, 2026. Patel replaces George Yuhas.
data.description: In Walnut Creek, California, Central Garden & Pet Company (NASDAQ: CENT) announced that Apur Patel has been appointed as the Chief Legal Officer, effective January 26, 2026, succeeding George Yuhas who is retiring. Mr. Patel will be responsible for managing all legal aspects for Central, covering corporate governance, mergers and acquisitions, securities, and compliance. Central is a top consumer goods company in the pet and garden sectors.

data.title: Alps Dx & Hamilton introduce Alps Dx Atelier at SLAS 2026, automating oral fluid workflows. News released in Richmond & Reno.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 26, 2026, Alps Dx and Hamilton Company unveiled the Alps Dx Atelier, an innovative automated system aimed at enhancing efficiency and consistency in the initial phase of oral fluid drug testing. This groundbreaking instrument will be featured at an upcoming event and marks a significant advancement in the field of drug testing technology.

data.title: Nucor Q4 2025: Net earnings $378M, EPS $1.64; adjusted earnings $400M, EPS $1.73; net sales $7.69B.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Nucor reported net earnings attributable to their stockholders of $378 million, equivalent to $1.64 per diluted share. Adjusted net earnings available to Nucor stockholders were $400 million, or $1.73 per diluted share. The company achieved net sales totaling $7.69 billion during this period. Furthermore, their net earnings before considering noncontrolling interests were also a notable figure.

data.title: McCormick & Company (NYSE: MKC) to present at CAGNY Conference on Feb. 17, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Brendan Foley to represent.
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland on January 26, 2026, McCormick & Company, Inc. (NYSE: MKC), a prominent flavor industry leader, is scheduled to present at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference at 5:00 p.m. ET on February 17, 2026. Brendan Foley will be the representative speaker from McCormick during the event.

data.title: RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:RMAX) to report Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026. Leading real estate franchisor.
data.description: RE/MAX Holdings, Inc. is scheduled to release information on Jan. 26, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as RMAX, is the parent organization of REMAX, a prominent real estate brokerage franchisor globally, and Motto Mortgage, the sole national mortgage brokerage franchise brand in the United States.

data.title: Freddie Mac released December 2025 Volume Summary detailing mortgage portfolios, securities, delinquencies, debt activities.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in MCLEAN, Virginia, Freddie Mac (OTCQB: FMCC) released its Monthly Volume Summary for December 2025. This report covers details about Freddie Mac's mortgage portfolios, securities issuance, risk management, delinquencies, debt activities, and additional investments. This update provides stakeholders with crucial insights into Freddie Mac's operations and financial performance during the specified period.

data.title: Pinnacle West to release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 25, 2026 before U.S. markets open.
data.description: Pinnacle West Capital intends to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before the opening of the U.S. financial markets on February 25, 2026.

data.title: Aptera Motors closes $9M public offering with potential warrants totaling $18M; boosts solar EV production efforts.
data.description: A company identified as Aptera, traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SEV, completed a public offering amounting to $9 million. The offering also included warrants that could potentially bring in an additional $18 million, making the total funding opportunity $27 million. This financial development is expected to propel the company's initiatives related to producing solar electric vehicles and validating their technology.

data.title: PlusAI to hold Analyst Day on Jan 28, 2026 in Calif. CEO, COO, CFO and others to discuss recent developments.
data.description: PlusAI, a prominent AI software provider for autonomous trucks, will be conducting an Analyst Day on Wednesday, January 28, 2026, starting at 12:30pm ET. The event will feature key executives including David Liu, the CEO and Co-Founder; Shawn Kerrigan, the COO and Co-Founder; Tim Daly, the Chief Architect and Co-Founder; and Steve Spinner, the CFO. This occasion will focus on discussing PlusAI's business insights, technological advancements, recent commercial and operational progress, as well as the company's go-to-market strategy.

data.title: Intercontinental Exchange CFO Warren Gardiner to present at UBS conference on Feb 9 at 11:20 am ET. Livestream available.
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider, revealed that Warren Gardiner, CFO, is scheduled to speak at the UBS Financial Services Conference. The presentation is set for Monday, February 9 at 11:20 a.m. ET. Those interested can view the presentation live or on replay through a webcast, accessible in the investor relations and media segment of ICE's website at http://ir.theice.com. Warren Gardiner's presentation at the UBS Financial Services Conference will provide valuable insights into ICE's financial strategies and outlook.

data.title: RBB Bancorp reports $10.2 million net income in Q4 2025, $31.9 million in Fiscal 2025, declares $0.16 dividend per share.
data.description: RBB Bancorp announced its financial results for Q4 2025 and FY 2025. In Q4 2025, net income was $10.2 million with a diluted EPS of $0.59, a slight increase from the previous quarter. For FY 2025, net income was $31.9 million, up 19.8% from FY 2024, with a diluted EPS of $1.83. Loans held for investment grew by $11.7 million for the quarter and $261.1 million for the year. Classified and criticized loans decreased by $31.8 million and $71.3 million, respectively. Nonperforming assets decreased by $852,000 for the quarter and $27.6 million for the year. Book value per share increased to $30.69 at the end of 2025. Net interest income for Q4 2025 was $29.5 million, and for FY 2025, it was $112.3 million. Net interest margin increased to 2.99% for Q4 2025 and 2.95% for FY 2025. The Company reported a provision for credit losses of $600,000 for Q4 2025 and $10.4 million for FY 2025. Total assets were $4.2 billion at the end of 2025. Total deposits were $3.4 billion, with nonperforming assets totaling $53.5 million, down from previous periods. Shareholders' equity increased to $523.4 million. The Board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.16 per share. The Company will hold a conference call on January 27, 2026, to discuss these results.

data.title: dLocal plans to share Q4 2025 financial results on March 18, 2026 after market close.
data.description: In Uruguay, on January 26, 2026, DLocal Limited (NASDAQ: DLO), a prominent financial technology company facilitating payments in emerging markets, plans to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter of the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The results are scheduled to be disclosed on March 18, 2026, following the closing of the market.

data.title: Daniel Marks appointed VP of Contracts and Pricing at Ingalls Shipbuilding, replacing Stephen Fitts, who moves to supply chain role. Scott Weldon retired after 25 years.
data.description: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on January 26, 2026, HII (NYSE: HII) revealed that Daniel Marks has been named the new vice president of contracts and pricing at Ingalls Shipbuilding. Marks takes over from Stephen Fitts, who is now the vice president of supply chain management at Ingalls, filling the role previously held by Scott Weldon who retired at the close of December 2025 following a 25-year tenure at the company.
